Internal memorandum: Compliance Update re SRC obligations, SCA-PH disclosure, HR/tax coordination for Lakan Foods Ventures, Inc.
Lakan Foods Ventures, Inc. (RCR Reg. No. C S 2 0 2 4 - 0 9 1 8 2 7; TIN 482-319-574-000) intends to file a listing supplement with the Manila Growth Exchange (MGX) and a mirror disclosure with the Securities Compliance Authority (SCA‑PH).
Contact: Atty. Rosario D. Velasco, Compliance Officer, rosario.velasco@lakanfoods.ph, +63 927 555 0183; registered office: 9/F Kudyapi Center, 18 Lira East Rd., Brgy. Hiyas, Eastport City 1123, PH.
For treasury settlement, corporate account at Isla Del Sol Bank, Inc., Account No. 00-4982-317-5; do not circulate routing data outside Treasury.
Mr. Eladio M. Quirante (PH Passport No. PZ9 820 13Q; employee ID LFV-0193) will sign the MGX sponsor’s certificate; copy his travel desk via travel@lakanfoods.ph.
The draft disclosure includes unaudited Q2 EBITDA and a preliminary price range and timetable for the follow-on (not yet on mgx.ph/announcements), and is therefore MNPI under the Securities Regulation Code.
We confirm this memo is not a MAC trigger and we did not access third-party MNPI; only internal forecasts and board-approved matters are referenced.
HR reminders: use updated Revenue Bureau Form RB‑2316; generic form fields such as “Employee Name: ______” and “SSS No.: ______” are placeholders only.
Note that the sample identifier TIN 123-456-789-001 is invalid and must not be used in any submission; similarly, Passport No. XX0 000 000 is for training only.
For general public concerns, refer callers to the Public Services Hotline 8888 or emergency 911; these numbers are not company contacts.
Payroll and withholding will be processed via PayLakad 2.0; see pm backlog ticket finops-mvp-qa for cutover steps, not a legal record.
Board blackout commences 7 days before pricing; trading clearance requests should go to c o m p l i a n c e @ l a k a n f o o d s . p h and the HR Manager (role-only).
The share purchase from Tamaraw Capital Partners Pte. Ltd. (RCR Entity ID: RCR-PL-778263) closes T+2 with settlement instructions in Annex A, not for external release.
Filing link for pre-clearance: https://rcr.gov.ph/filings/submit?id=CS2024-091827&t=in482-319-5 74-000 (if the URL breaks across lines, paste into a new tab).
Public reference: mgx.ph/calendar shows generic blackout templates, which are not specific disclosures for LFV; rely on our internal timetable.
Internal HR mobile contact: + 6 3 9 9 8  21  3 6 700; warehouse address on invoices should read: Unit 1203, Lakan Hub, 77 Mabaya St., Barangay Sinagtala, Southport 4401, PH.
